text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Summer camp begins today, and<n>we'll be training
hard at a<n>campground near the beach while
we're here.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
It's the perfect opportunity to polish<n>up Narita
Taishin's abilities before the<n>Kikuka Sho, but...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
It's just... As it is, I already don't get<n>much time to
myself living in the<n>dorms.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
But at summer camp, I have negative<n>alone time,
and that's depressing as<n>hell.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Now that she mentions it, I can see<n>why this
environment would be<n>stressful for her.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
It won't do for Narita Taishin to<n>continue this way,
so I start thinking<n>about how to cheer her up.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, there's seriously no one here.<n>I had no
idea this place existed.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Huh. This might be a decent spot to<n>nap since it's
so quiet.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I was wondering why you were<n>running around
everywhere. Was it<n>just to find a place like this?
choice_data_list: Yep! I was hoping it could help you relax!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Look, I go through this every year, so<n>don't waste
your time stressing out. I<n>can train perfectly well
without you<n>being so extra.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Yeah, yeah. Whatever. Just leave it.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, don't we have training to<n>do? Are we
gonna get started or not?
choice_data_list: Yes, of course! I'll get everything ready!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
It's so freakin' hard to find the right<n>time to say
thanks...
